---
title: " "
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    df_print: paged
    css: styles.css
---

<div class="page-title">Microcystin Phylogenetics</div>

<div class="research-layout">
<nav class="research-nav">
<p class="research-nav-title">Projects</p>
<a href="research-bph.html">PCB Degradation</a>
<a href="research-mars.html">Mars Habitation</a>
<a class="active" href="research-phylo.html">Microcystin Phylogenetics</a>
</nav>
<div class="research-content">

<img class="research-hero-img" src="images/research-phylo.jpg" alt="Microcystin phylogenetics">

## Background

*[Placeholder — the research question behind the phylogenetics work: what you were investigating about microcystin, and why it matters.]*

## Approach

*[Placeholder — your methods: sequence data used, alignment, phylogenetic analysis tools/software, how the tree was built.]*

## Results / What Was Found

*[Placeholder — key findings. This is a good place to embed or link the poster itself.]*

## Poster

*[Placeholder — embed the poster image or link to a downloadable PDF of the presentation.]*

</div>
</div>
